THE PROBLEM & THE SOLUTION

Why We Built HUSTI

Most savings apps want your data, your money, and a monthly fee.
HUSTI wants none of that.

Your Data Stays Yours

Everything is stored locally on your device. No servers, no cloud, no tracking. Your financial habits are nobody's business but yours.

Habits, Not Spreadsheets

HUSTI uses the science of habit formation to make saving feel natural. Log daily, build streaks, earn badges. Saving becomes second nature.

Beautiful by Design

A stunning interface with custom wallpapers, smooth animations, and a premium feel that makes you actually want to open the app every day.

HUSTI VS OTHERS

Not Just Another
Budgeting App

HUSTI Mode: Activated

Other Apps

  • ✕ Require cloud accounts & sign-ups
  • ✕ Monthly subscription fees
  • ✕ Harvest and sell your financial data
  • ✕ Complex UI with dozens of menus
  • ✕ Require constant internet connection

HUSTI

  • ✓ Zero sign-up — install and go
  • ✓ Free forever — no hidden costs
  • ✓ 100% offline — data never leaves your device
  • ✓ Clean, habit-focused calendar interface
  • ✓ Works without internet, anywhere
GETTING STARTED

Start Saving in 60 Seconds

No app store. No sign-up. No passwords. Just install and go.

01

Install HUSTI

Add HUSTI to your home screen with one tap. It works like a native app — no app store needed. Takes 10 seconds.

02

Create Your Jars

Set up saving categories like "Travel Fund", "Emergency Stash", "New Phone" — or anything you're saving toward.

03

Log Daily Savings

Tap any day on the calendar. Use one-tap presets or enter custom amounts. The whole process takes under 5 seconds.

04

Watch Your Money Grow

Beautiful charts, daily trends, and achievement badges keep you motivated. Your savings habit becomes unstoppable.

Takes 10s
Zero Sign-up
WHAT'S INCLUDED

Everything You Need.
Nothing You Don't.

Visual Calendar

Color-coded daily tracking. See your entire savings month at a glance.

1 2 3 4 5

Quick Presets

Create one-tap logging buttons with custom amounts and categories.

Smart Analytics

Charts, trends, and insights that keep you motivated and on track.

Goals & Targets

Set monthly savings targets and watch your progress fill up.

Trip Fund 75%

Backup & Restore

Export data as a tiny JSON file. Re-import anytime, anywhere.

Custom Wallpapers

Personalize your calendar view with beautiful backgrounds.

Multi-Currency

Works with any currency worldwide — INR, USD, EUR, GBP, and more.

Achievements

Earn badges for savings consistency, milestones, and daily streaks.

🔥 30d Streak 🎯 Goal Met 👑 Elite Saver

Ready to Save
Smarter?

HUSTI is free, private, and works completely offline.
Install it now and start building your savings habit today.

Save Daily
PWA Support

iOS

Add HUSTI to your iPhone home screen.

Android

Install HUSTI as a PWA on Android.

Desktop

Supports both macOS and Windows desktop installs.

HUSTI

Save smarter. Build habits. Keep it private.
